Fields.Name: Additional Resistance - First Activation
Fields.Description: A value that is added to the resistance value after the abnormal condition is activated once.

Fields.Name: Additional Resistance - Second Activation
Fields.Description: A value that is added to the resistance value after the abnormal condition is activated twice.

Fields.Name: Additional Resistance - Third Activation
Fields.Description: A value that is added to the resistance value after the abnormal condition is activated 3 times.

Fields.Name: Additional Resistance - Fourth Activation
Fields.Description: A value that is added to the resistance value after the abnormal condition is activated 4 times.

Fields.Name: Additional Resistance - Fifth Activation
Fields.Description: A value that is added to the resistance value after the abnormal condition is activated 5 times.

Fields.Name: Resistance Multiplier - First Activation
Fields.Description: Magnification applied to the resistance value after the abnormal condition is activated once

Fields.Name: Resistance Multiplier - Second Activation
Fields.Description: Magnification applied to the resistance value after the abnormal condition is activated twice

Fields.Name: Resistance Multiplier - Third Activation
Fields.Description: Magnification applied to the resistance value after the abnormal condition is activated 3 times

Fields.Name: Resistance Multiplier - Fourth Activation
Fields.Description: Magnification applied to the resistance value after the abnormal condition is activated 4 times

Fields.Name: Resistance Multiplier - Fifth Activation
Fields.Description: Magnification applied to the resistance value after the abnormal condition is activated 5 times
